name: UploadThing
description: Adds simple UploadThing file-management tools for approved threads.

env.description: Fallback UploadThing API key used when no api_key Plugin Setting is configured.

settings.label: UploadThing API key
settings.description: UploadThing API key used for REST API requests. Falls back to UPLOADTHING_API_KEY.

access.name: UploadThing
access.description: Expose UploadThing file listing, project download, project upload, and delete tools to selected threads.

tools.name: list_files
tools.description: List files in the configured UploadThing app. Parameters: optional limit number (default 500, max 100000) and optional offset number (default 0).

tools.name: get_file
tools.description: Download an UploadThing file into the current project. Parameters: provide fileKey string or customId string; optional fileName for a root-level output file, optional path project output path (defaults to ./<UploadThing filename>), and expiresIn number in seconds (default 3600, max 604800).

tools.name: upload_file
tools.description: Upload a readable project file to UploadThing using /v7/prepareUpload. Parameters: required path string starting with ./; optional acl (public-read or private), contentDisposition (inline or attachment), customId string, slug string, expiresIn number, metadata JSON value, and type MIME string.

tools.name: delete_file
tools.description: Delete UploadThing files. Parameters: provide at least one non-empty string array: fileKeys, customIds, or deprecated files legacy IDs.
